# Test Report — Orders F-01 / F-02

## Run Metadata

- **X-Request-ID prefix**: `pw-*` (each test generates unique UUID)
- **Seed reset**: `bash scripts/orders-reset.sh` executed pre-run
- **Base URL**: `http://localhost:8080`
- **Playwright version**: 1.42.0

## Per-Scenario Result

### API layer — `orders-flow01-api.spec.ts`

| Scenario | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| ORDERS-HP-001 submit single-item | ✅ Passed | 201, state=CONFIRMED, order_number match pattern |
| ORDERS-HP-003 flagged > USD 1,000 | ✅ Passed | flagged=true observed |
| ORDERS-BR-003 payment declined | ✅ Passed | 402, code=PAYMENT_DECLINED |
| ORDERS-IDEM-001 replay same key | ✅ Passed | order_id identical |
| ORDERS-SP-001 missing Idempotency-Key | ✅ Passed | 400, code=VALIDATION_ERROR |

### FE layer — `orders-flow01-checkout.spec.ts`

| Scenario | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| ORDERS-HP-001 UI confirmation | ✅ Passed | confirmation banner + order number visible |
| ORDERS-BR-003 UI decline banner | ✅ Passed | error code chip matches PAYMENT_DECLINED |
| ORDERS-BR-001 UI price drift | ⏭ Skipped (fixme) | needs catalog background flip — see gap note |

## Gaps & Known Flakes

- **ORDERS-BR-001 fixme** — requires concurrent catalog price flip during submit; not expressible with default seed. Tracked for future helper script `scripts/orders-catalog-flip.sh`.
- **Latency NFR (AC-10)** — P95 ≤ 3s — out of scope for functional suite. Run load test separately.
